name: CookieYes
description: CookieYes — Cookie consent management plugin with automated scanning, geo-based banner display, and compliance reporting.

seo.title: CookieYes — Compliance Automation
seo.meta_description: CookieYes: CookieYes — Cookie consent management plugin with automated scanning, geo-based banner display, and compliance reporting.

when_to_use: WordPress cookie consent plugin with auto-scan on publish
Geo-based GDPR/CCPA banner targeting by visitor location
Cookie audit report for legal and compliance team review
Consent log storage for 3-year GDPR audit trail
Google Consent Mode v2 integration for GA4 compliance

pros: Generous free tier handles small-site GDPR needs
Geo-targeted consent banner shows correct law per visitor
Works with WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, custom sites
Pricing well below Cookiebot for equivalent scans
cons: Reporting and consent logs thinner than enterprise CMPs
Customer support reportedly slow on free and low tiers
Banner design customization limited without CSS
Lacks full IAB TCF support for ad-tech use cases
review.verdict: The value pick against Cookiebot and OneTrust — you lose some polish but save serious money.
review.best_for: SMBs and solo site owners wanting affordable cookie consent
review.not_for: Publishers needing TCF 2.2, deep logs, or enterprise SLA support
